page.connectionDescription: Manage Meta WhatsApp Cloud API settings, verify webhook connectivity, and send test messages.

settings.title: Connection Settings
settings.enabledDescription: When enabled, webhook and test sends use these settings.
settings.saveError: WhatsApp settings could not be saved.

test.title: Test Message
test.defaultMessage: This is a V3RII CRM WhatsApp test message.
test.sendError: WhatsApp test message could not be sent.

logs.title: WhatsApp Logs
logs.description: Monitor webhook, test message, and future quote flow records.

flow.title: WhatsApp Quote Flow
flow.description: A safe module plan for customers to request quotes from their phone.

inbound.title: 1. Message Intake
inbound.text: Incoming customer messages are received through webhook, signature-checked, and logged as raw events.

intent.title: 2. Intent and Stock Selection
intent.text: Customers are guided through catalog or stock branches; free text is not converted into orders directly.

quote.title: 3. Quote Draft
quote.text: Selections create a CRM quote draft; no final document is created before representative review.

handoff.title: 4. Representative Approval
handoff.text: Price, discount, delivery, and customer checks are completed before the quote is sent back.

flow.nextPhaseText: This phase opens the foundation. Conversation flow, catalog selections, quote drafts, and WhatsApp template sends will be added in a separate controlled phase.
